description: Create the QuantMeet app scaffold with package.json, tsconfig.json, and the Fastify backend entry point (app.ts) with WebSocket support. Create all backend services: room.service.ts, sfu.service.ts, recording.service.ts, transcript.service.ts, summary.service.ts, action-items.service.ts, and breakout.service.ts. Create routes: rooms.ts, recordings.ts, ws.ts. Create frontend type definitions for VideoTile, ParticipantGrid, ControlBar, ChatPanel, TranscriptPanel, BackgroundBlur.
steps: Create apps/quantmeet/package.json following the pattern from apps/quantube/package.json. Include deps: @quant/ai workspace:*, @quant/queue workspace:*, @quant/storage workspace:*, @quant/auth workspace:*, @quant/common workspace:*, @quant/server-core workspace:*, fastify ^5.3.3, @fastify/websocket ^11.0.2, ioredis ^5.6.1, zod ^3.25.23. Scripts: dev, build, typecheck, test (vitest run).

Create apps/quantmeet/tsconfig.json extending ../../tsconfig.json with outDir ./dist, rootDir ., includes backend/**/*.ts and src/**/*.ts, references to used packages (ai, queue, storage, auth, common, server-core).
Create apps/quantmeet/backend/app.ts following the pattern from apps/quantube/backend/app.ts. Register @fastify/websocket, register routes for /rooms, /recordings, and /ws.

Create apps/quantmeet/backend/services/room.service.ts - Class RoomService with in-memory Map<string, Room> store. Methods: createRoom(input: CreateRoomInput): Room, joinRoom(roomId, participant): Room, leaveRoom(roomId, participantId): Room, getRoom(roomId): Room, listParticipants(roomId): Participant[], closeRoom(roomId): void. Use Zod schemas for input validation. Room interface: { id, name, hostId, participants: Participant[], createdAt, settings: RoomSettings }. Participant: { id, userId, displayName, joinedAt, role, audioEnabled, videoEnabled }.

Create apps/quantmeet/backend/services/sfu.service.ts - Class SFUService for WebRTC SFU media routing. Methods: createTransport(roomId, participantId, direction): TransportInfo, connectTransport(transportId, dtlsParameters): void, produce(transportId, kind, rtpParameters): ProducerInfo, consume(transportId, producerId, rtpCapabilities): ConsumerInfo, closeProducer(producerId): void, closeConsumer(consumerId): void. All with proper TypeScript interfaces.

Create apps/quantmeet/backend/services/recording.service.ts - Class RecordingService with @quant/storage dependency. Methods: startRecording(roomId, userId): Recording, stopRecording(recordingId): Recording, getRecording(recordingId): Recording, listRecordings(roomId): Recording[]. Recording interface: { id, roomId, userId, status, startedAt, stoppedAt, storageKey, duration, fileSize }.

Create apps/quantmeet/backend/services/transcript.service.ts - Class TranscriptService with @quant/ai dependency (SpeechToTextService). Methods: processAudioChunk(roomId, participantId, audioBuffer): TranscriptSegment, getTranscript(roomId): TranscriptSegment[], clearTranscript(roomId): void. TranscriptSegment: { id, roomId, participantId, text, timestamp, duration, confidence }.

Create apps/quantmeet/backend/services/summary.service.ts - Class SummaryService with @quant/ai dependency. Methods: generateSummary(transcript: TranscriptSegment[]): MeetingSummary, generateFromRoomId(roomId): MeetingSummary. MeetingSummary: { id, roomId, summary, keyPoints, decisions, generatedAt }.

Create apps/quantmeet/backend/services/action-items.service.ts - Class ActionItemsService with @quant/ai dependency. Methods: extractActionItems(transcript: TranscriptSegment[]): ActionItem[], extractFromRoomId(roomId): ActionItem[]. ActionItem: { id, title, description, assignee, dueDate, priority, status }.

Create apps/quantmeet/backend/services/breakout.service.ts - Class BreakoutService. Methods: createBreakoutRoom(parentRoomId, name, assignedParticipantIds): BreakoutRoom, assignParticipant(breakoutRoomId, participantId): BreakoutRoom, closeBreakoutRoom(breakoutRoomId): void, listBreakoutRooms(parentRoomId): BreakoutRoom[], returnToMainRoom(breakoutRoomId, participantId): void. BreakoutRoom: { id, parentRoomId, name, participants, createdAt, closedAt }.

Create apps/quantmeet/backend/routes/rooms.ts - Fastify plugin with: POST / (create room), POST /:id/join (join), POST /:id/leave (leave), GET /:id (get room), GET /:id/participants (list participants), DELETE /:id (close room). Use Zod for body/param validation.

Create apps/quantmeet/backend/routes/recordings.ts - Fastify plugin with: POST /:roomId/start (start recording), POST /:id/stop (stop recording), GET /:id (get recording), GET /room/:roomId (list recordings). Use Zod for validation.

Create apps/quantmeet/backend/routes/ws.ts - Fastify WebSocket plugin for signaling. Handle events: join-room, leave-room, offer, answer, ice-candidate, mute/unmute, start-screen-share, stop-screen-share. Route messages to room participants.

Create apps/quantmeet/src/types/components.ts - TypeScript interfaces for frontend component types: VideoTileProps, ParticipantGridProps, ControlBarProps, ChatPanelProps, TranscriptPanelProps, BackgroundBlurConfig. Include all needed sub-types (ChatMessage, TranscriptEntry, etc.).

Create apps/quantmeet/src/types/ai-features.ts - TypeScript interfaces for AI features: LiveTranscriptConfig, BackgroundBlurONNXConfig, MeetingSummaryResult, ActionItemResult, SmartMuteDetectionConfig, MeetingPrepConfig, MeetingPrepResult.
acceptance_criteria: apps/quantmeet/package.json exists with correct deps and scripts
apps/quantmeet/tsconfig.json extends root and compiles without errors
apps/quantmeet/backend/app.ts exports buildApp() that creates Fastify app with WebSocket and registers all routes
RoomService supports create, join, leave, getRoom, listParticipants, closeRoom
SFUService handles createTransport, connectTransport, produce, consume, closeProducer, closeConsumer
RecordingService supports start, stop, get, list with @quant/storage integration
TranscriptService processes audio chunks and returns transcript segments
SummaryService generates meeting summaries from transcripts
ActionItemsService extracts todos with assignees from transcripts
BreakoutService creates sub-rooms, assigns participants, closes rooms
Frontend type definitions are complete TypeScript interfaces
verification: Run npx tsc --noEmit from apps/quantmeet/ to confirm TypeScript compiles cleanly
findings: TS6305 errors about unbuilt project references are pre-existing in all apps (confirmed same pattern in quantube). These are not actual code errors. The commit-msg hook requires NODE_OPTIONS to be empty to run properly.
